title: WolfTpmLinuxDev and WolfTpmSwtpm are not Send
description: wolftpm-tss/src/connection.rs: WolfTpmLinuxDev and WolfTpmSwtpm have no 'unsafe impl Send' impl. WOLFTPM2_DEV contains *mut c_void (userCtx) and function-pointer fields that make the bindgen-generated type \!Send. Box<WOLFTPM2_DEV> therefore does not auto-derive Send. wolftpm::Device solved this with 'unsafe impl Send for Device {}' and a detailed safety comment (device.rs:11-24). The same argument applies to the TSS wrappers: all internal state is in the struct (no thread-local C state), the Box gives a stable heap address, and Sync is still not implemented (exclusive &mut access required). Without Send, users who try to move a WolfTpmLinuxDev into a tokio task or across threads will get a compile error with no guidance. Add 'unsafe impl Send for WolfTpmLinuxDev {}' and 'unsafe impl Send for WolfTpmSwtpm {}' with the same safety argument as wolftpm::Device.
